site-content.heroTitle: You Bring the Idea. We Build the Business.
site-content.heroSubtitle: Have money and a vision? We handle the rest. From Trade Licenses and Legal Paperwork to Web Development and Digital Marketing — LumiNex is your complete startup partner.
site-content.aboutDescription: At LumiNex, we believe that professional service management should be seamless, transparent, and scalable for every business.
site-content.visionDescription: To redefine the global landscape of B2B service delivery by creating an intelligent, transparent, and highly accessible ecosystem. We envision a future where every business can access world-class professional services through a single, unified digital platform that blends cutting-edge AI automation with specialized human ingenuity.
site-content.missionDescription: Our mission is to eliminate the operational hurdles that stifle business growth. We are committed to providing a secure, reliable, and user-centric platform that handles everything from IT infrastructure and brand development to legal compliance. By simplifying complex workflows, we empower entrepreneurs to focus on innovation.
site-content.servicesSubtitle: We don't just provide services; we build foundations. Choose a package that covers everything from your legal identity to your digital presence.

services.title: Digital Foundation
services.description: Professional Website, Domain (1 Year), Business Email, and Basic SEO.

services.title: Growth Accelerator
services.description: E-Commerce Platform, Marketing (3 Months), Social Media Mgmt, and 24/7 Support.

services.title: A-to-Z Launchpad
services.description: Business Formation, Trade License, Web & Mobile App, and Launch Manager.

site-content.ctaDescription: Join hundreds of successful businesses already using LumiNex.

knowledgeBase.title: How to Handle a New Client Request
knowledgeBase.content:
When a new client submits a request:
1. Review the request details in All Requests.
2. Assign it to the appropriate employee based on their specialization.
3. Set the priority level (LOW, NORMAL, HIGH, URGENT).
4. Send an internal note to the client confirming the assignment.
5. Follow up within 24 hours.

knowledgeBase.title: Invoice Generation SOP
knowledgeBase.content:
To generate an invoice for a completed payment:
1. Navigate to Admin > Payments.
2. Find the relevant payment record.
3. Click 'Generate Invoice'.
4. The PDF will be automatically created and downloaded.
5. Share the invoice with the client via email.

Note: Only PAID payments can have invoices generated.

knowledgeBase.title: Employee Task Management Guide
knowledgeBase.content:
Managing your assigned tasks:
1. Go to Employee > My Tasks to see all your assignments.
2. Click a task to open the Task Detail view.
3. Use the Time Tracker to log your working hours accurately.
4. Update the progress slider as you advance.
5. Change status to REVIEW when done for admin approval.
6. Add detailed employee notes for every action taken.

Best Practice: Update progress daily to keep the admin informed.

knowledgeBase.title: Trade License Registration Process
knowledgeBase.content:
For clients requesting Trade License registration:
1. Collect: NID copy, recent photo, and rent agreement from client.
2. Visit the local City Corporation or Municipal office.
3. Fill out the application form.
4. Submit documents along with the required fees.
5. Expected delivery: 7-10 working days.

Fee: BDT 5,000 (may vary by location and business type).

knowledgeBase.title: Escalation Policy
knowledgeBase.content:
When to escalate a request to the Admin:
- Client is unresponsive for more than 3 business days.
- Technical issues are beyond your skill set.
- A refund or payment dispute is raised.
- The delivery deadline cannot be met.

How to escalate:
1. Add a detailed note to the task explaining the situation.
2. Change the task priority to URGENT.
3. Notify the admin directly through the internal chat.
